description_long: This is a modern, minimalist sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a light blue upholstery. The sofa features three distinct seat and back cushions, all of which are uniform in size and seamlessly integrated into the frame. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a geometric and contemporary appearance. The legs are short, angled, and appear to be made of wood or metal with a dark finish, providing a subtle contrast to the upholstery. The surface of the sofa is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting, stitching, or decorative elements. This design is well-suited for urban environments such as public lounges, waiting areas, or modern parks.
description: A light blue, modern sofa with three uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and short, angled dark legs. The design is minimalist and smooth, with no visible decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, the thickness of the backrest, and the short, angled leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg design seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all seamlessly integrated and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a minimalist, unpadded appearance and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, angled legs positioned at the corners, likely made of wood or metal with a dark finish, exposed and simple in style.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest segmented into three equal sections, matching the seat cushions with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light blue upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
